feed.title: The future of the Bitcoin Core GUI

entry.title: The future of the Bitcoin Core GUI
entry.summary: The discussion revolves around Hebasto's current situation regarding the development of a Graphical User Interface (GUI). It is suggested that collaboration with other developers could be beneficial, especially if Hebasto finds himself at an impasse. The insistence on moving away from the GUI within a single release cycle without providing any fallback solutions is criticized and viewed as potentially detrimental. The suggestion implies that alternative approaches or insights from other developers might offer a way forward that does not involve completely abandoning the current GUI project. This perspective is based on the concern that hastily deprecating the GUI could have negative repercussions, hence the recommendation for Hebasto to consider stepping aside or seeking collaborative efforts rather than pushing for immediate deprecation without a clear, alternative plan in place.
